entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A feed/industrial crop and staple food used in this study for trait evaluation and mapping.

entities.name: SUGARCANE
entities.description: A crop in which the SbSNF4-2 gene was overexpressed to evaluate its impact on biomass and sugar yield.

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING (DF)
entities.description: A phenological trait measuring the time to reach 50% flowering.

entities.name: BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of living organisms in a given area or plant.

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT (PH)
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant.

entities.name: SOLUBLE SOLID CONTENT (SSC)
entities.description: A measure of the dissolved solids in the plant juice, often related to sugar content.

entities.name: JUICE WEIGHT (JW)
entities.description: The weight of the juice extracted from the plant.

entities.name: SUGAR YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of sugar produced by the crop.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE ASSOCIATION MAPPING
entities.description: A method used to associate genetic markers with specific traits across the genome.

entities.name: TRANSGENIC STUDIES
entities.description: Studies involving the manipulation of an organism's genes to observe phenotypic changes.

entities.name: SINGLE NUCLEOTIDE POLYMORPHISM MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used in association mapping to identify genomic regions associated with traits.

entities.name: SOBIC.006G061100 (SBSNF4-2)
entities.description: A gene encoding a gamma subunit of the AMPK/SNF1/SnRK1 complex that impacts biomass and sugar yield.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with a particular phenotypic trait.

entities.name: CHROMOSOME 6
entities.description: The specific genomic location where a quantitative trait locus for plant height was identified.

entities.name: AMPK/SNF1/SNRK1 HETEROTRIMERIC COMPLEXES
entities.description: Evolutionarily conserved protein complexes of which SbSNF4-2 is a gamma subunit.

entities.name: SORGHUM MINI CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A subset of sorghum germplasm used for trait evaluation and association mapping.

entities.name: SORGHUM REFERENCE SET
entities.description: A set of sorghum genotypes used for trait evaluation and association mapping.

entities.name: TESTING ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The various environmental conditions in which the crops were evaluated.
